# Vessl

> Vessl is a premium car-marketplace platform, built as a white-label SaaS demo. It pairs a public storefront (inventory, interactive 3D vehicle viewer, blog, consultations and quotes) with a customer dashboard and a full RBAC admin panel, on a zero-cost backend of Firebase (Firestore + Auth) and 13 Cloudflare Workers.

## About

- Product: Vessl — "Your showroom, elevated."
- Type: Premium car-marketplace platform / white-label SaaS
- Web app: https://vessl.aoneahsan.com
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.aoneahsan.vessl
- Stack: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind v4, Radix UI, TanStack Router/Query/Table, React Hook Form + Zod, Three.js, i18next, Firebase (Firestore + Auth), Cloudflare Workers, Capacitor 8 (Android)
- Author: Ahsan Mahmood (https://aoneahsan.com)

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/): what Vessl is and how the docs are organized.
- [Overview](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/overview): the product surface at a glance.
- [Tech stack](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/tech-stack): every dependency and why it is used.
- [Local setup](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/local-setup): run the app locally.
- [Marketplace](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/marketplace): inventory, search, categories, comparison.
- [3D viewer](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/3d-viewer): Three.js GLTF vehicle viewer.
- [Consultations & quotes](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/consultations-quotes): booking + quote/inquiry flows.
- [Dashboard](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/dashboard): the signed-in customer area.
- [Admin](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/admin): the RBAC operations console.
- [i18n & currency](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/i18n-currency): translations and multi-currency pricing.
- [Theming](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/theming): the user-facing theme customizer.
- [Architecture](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/architecture/overview): how the pieces fit together.
- [Firestore data model](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/architecture/firestore-data-model): collections and ownership.
- [RBAC](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/architecture/rbac): roles and permissions.
- [Workers overview](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/workers/overview): the Cloudflare Workers backend.
- [Workers reference](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/workers/reference): each worker and its endpoints.
- [Deployment](https://vessl-docs.aoneahsan.com/deployment/web-hosting): how to ship web, workers, and Android.
